phase3HygieneFixes: Updated the Phase 3 run-log commit/push status to record 8bf6fe7 chore: remove announcements from MVP workspace.
compatibilityDecisions: Existing legacy admin remains platform-equivalent through isPlatformAdmin.
isAdmin remains a legacy-admin-only compatibility helper so current legacy admin-only routes are not broadened.
canManageUsers now recognizes platform_admin and legacy admin, while current admin import and role assignment routes continue to require isAdmin until scoped user-management work is approved.
site_admin can view assigned site operations through helper checks but is not a platform admin, security admin, or user manager.
viewer is read-only and cannot mutate reviews, staff notes, mentor assignments, presentation operations, archive operations, users, security, or tenant config.
org_admin requires assigned tenant scope and is not granted platform security or user management in this phase.
program_teacher remains scoped by existing program/cohort roles and related site-program mappings.
mentor remains assigned-student-only and cannot access full site directories or review mutation.
student remains self-only through existing self-service compatibility.
misc_admin remains legacy/narrow and is not promoted to platform, org, site, or viewer behavior.
Missing, invalid, inactive, or empty tenant/site/program/cohort scopes deny access where scope is required.
No production routes were broadly converted in this helper-first phase.
No domain, OAuth, Cloudflare hostname, remote migration, remote write, UI, or seed behavior was changed.

validation.notes: 267 passing tests and 4 expected local HTTP skips.
Aggregate checks passed, including static Cloudflare config checks and the full test suite.
Passed with existing CRLF normalization warnings only.
